name: Arcane Bolt
description: Channel arcane energy through the tome. Hold RMB + press 1.

name: Elemental Blast
description: Releases a burst matching the tome's element. Hold RMB + press 1.

name: Spirit Surge
description: Summons a wave of spiritual energy. Hold RMB + press 1.

name: Mana Shield
description: Conjure a protective barrier that absorbs damage. Hold RMB + press 2.

name: Runic Ward
description: Place a runic circle that heals allies inside. Hold RMB + press 2.

name: Knowledge Drain
description: Drain mana and intelligence from target. Hold RMB + press 2.

name: Frost Prison
description: Encase target in ice. Hold RMB + press 2.

name: Thunderstorm
description: Call down lightning around you. Hold RMB + press 2.

name: Arcane Riposte
description: Parry with sword then counter with a spell blast. Requires: Sword mainhand.

name: Holy Smite
description: Smash with mace channeling tome power. Requires: Mace mainhand.

name: Runic Rend
description: Axe strike leaves a runic bleed. Requires: Axe mainhand.

name: Shadow Step
description: Blink behind target and backstab with dagger. Requires: Dagger mainhand.

name: Arcane Quake
description: Slam hammer into ground releasing tome energy. Requires: Hammer mainhand.

name: Imbued Shot
description: Fire a pistol round charged with tome magic. Requires: Pistol mainhand.

name: Apocalypse Tome
description: Unleash all pages — massive AoE elemental storm. Hold RMB + press 4.

name: Genesis
description: Rewrite reality — full party heal + damage immunity 3s. Hold RMB + press 4.
